steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that by the mid-1980s, environmental reforms and declining meat prices caused a "natural forest regrowth." The blank must be filled with graph data that directly shows forest cover increasing after that period.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "difference between the forest cover area in Class I-IV and in Class VI in 2000.": Compares two classes at a single point in time — shows no change over time and no regrowth trend. ✗
  • "increase in the forest cover area for all classes from 1979 to 2000.": A rise across all classes spanning the post-1980s period directly evidences the regrowth the passage describes. ✓
  • "decrease in the forest cover area for all classes from 1960 to 1979.": Shows the earlier deforestation trend, not the regrowth that followed. ✗
  • "similarity in forest cover area in Class I-IV and Class VII in 1986.": A single-year comparison between two classes shows no directional change and does not demonstrate regrowth. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
